source_receipts.anchor: Internal 95.6% exact-day agreement (262/274) vs Villalobos T

verbatim_evidence.claim: Standardizes platinum-free-interval (PFI) and treatment-timing computation from structured treatment history using explicit operational definitions, enabling consistent platinum-sensitivity categorization.

attributes.what_it_does: Standardizes platinum-free-interval (PFI) and treatment-timing computation from structured treatment history using explicit operational definitions, enabling consistent platinum-sensitivity categorization.
attributes.validated_on: Internal 95.6% exact-day agreement (262/274) vs Villalobos TCGA-OV; external vs ARIEL3 (n=375) distributions not different (chi2 p=0.12) but TOST equivalence narrowly missed (p=0.073)
attributes.cannot_do: Internal verification confirms algorithmic CONSISTENCY, not clinical validity. External equivalence is INCONCLUSIVE (underpowered), NOT a positive equivalence result. Not a clinical decision system.
